title: Stock Futures Higher, Oil Elevated as European and Asian Markets Shut
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: Stock futures were higher, driven by optimism in technology, while oil prices remained elevated above $100 per barrel due to Strait of Hormuz tensions. U.S. Tre
excerpt: Stock futures were higher, driven by optimism in technology, while oil prices remained elevated above $100 per barrel due to Strait of Hormuz tensions. U.S. Treasurys were steady as European and Asian markets closed.

content.introduction: Stock futures were higher, driven by optimism in technology, while oil prices remained elevated above $100 per barrel due to Strait of Hormuz tensions. U.S. Treasurys were steady as European and Asian markets closed.

[Oil](https://www.reuters.com/business/energy/oil-prices-open-higher-us-israeli-war-with-iran-continues-disrupt-supply-2026-04-05/) lost ground earlier in a choppy session as the U.S. and Iran weighed their next steps, but futures ultimately finished higher. In [currencies](https://www.reuters.com/world/asia-pacific/dollar-steady-traders-fret-about-escalating-iran-war-2026-04-06/), the dollar index , which measures the greenback against a basket of currencies including the yen and the euro, fell 0.21% to 99.99. *   [Stocks](https://www.reuters.com/markets/stocks/). ## [World](https://www.reuters.com/world/). *   [Home](https://www.reuters.com/). *    [Podcasts](https://www.reuters.com/podcasts/). *   [Home](https://www.reuters.com/). *   [World](https://www.reuters.com/world/). *   [Business](https://www.reuters.com/business/). *   [Markets](https://www.reuters.com/markets/). *   [Sustainability](https://www.reuters.com/sustainability/). *   [Legal](https://www.reuters.com/legal/). *   [Technology](https://www.reuters.com/technology/). *   [Sports](https://www.reuters.com/sports/). *    [Podcasts](https://www.reuters.com/podcasts/). *   [Media Center, opens new tab](https://www.reuters.com/media-center/). *   [Newsletters](https://www.reuters.com/newsletters/). *   [](https://www.facebook.com/Reuters). *   [](https://www.instagram.com/Reuters).
